'''''UFC on Fox: Poirier vs. Gaethje''''' (also known as '''''UFC on FOX 29''''') was a [[mixed martial arts]] event produced by the [[Ultimate Fighting Championship]] that was held on April 14, 2018, at the [[Gila River Arena]] in [[Glendale, Arizona]].<ref name="Glendale">{{cite news|url=http://www.glendalestar.com/sports/article_823990fc-126a-11e8-a5fb-3759c5579239.html|title=Gila River Arena to host first ever UFC Fight Night April 14 |publisher=glendalestar.com|author=Darrell Jackson|date=2018-01-27|access-date=2018-01-27}}</ref>

==Background==
After previously contesting two events at the nearby [[Talking Stick Resort Arena]] in Phoenix, the event was the first that the promotion held in Glendale. [[Zuffa]] had previously hosted the final [[World Extreme Cagefighting]] event, [[WEC 53]] at the arena in December 2010.<ref name="Glendale" />

The event was headlined by a lightweight bout between [[Dustin Poirier]] and former [[WSOF Lightweight Championship|WSOF Lightweight Champion]] [[Justin Gaethje]].<ref name="ME">{{Cite news|url=http://www.ufc.com/news/Poirier-Gaethje-to-headline-FOX-event-in-April|title=Poirier-Gaethje to headline FOX event in April|publisher=ufc.com|author=Thomas Gerbasi|date=2018-01-19|access-date=2018-01-19}}</ref>

A lightweight bout between [[Gilbert Burns]] and [[Lando Vannata]] was linked to the event. However, the pairing never materialized as Vannata was unable to accept the fight for this date as he was still rehabilitating a recent arm injury.<ref>{{Cite news|url=https://www.bloodyelbow.com/2018/3/18/17135450/mma-news-gilbert-burns-vs-lando-vannata-not-happening-ufc-on-fox-29|title=Gilbert Burns vs. Lando Vannata not happening at UFC on FOX 29|publisher=bloodyelbow.com|author=Mookie Alexander|date=2018-03-18|access-date=2018-03-18|archive-date=2018-06-29|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180629102300/https://www.bloodyelbow.com/2018/3/18/17135450/mma-news-gilbert-burns-vs-lando-vannata-not-happening-ufc-on-fox-29|url-status=dead}}</ref>

[[Abdul Razak Alhassan]] was scheduled to face [[Muslim Salikhov]] at the event. However, Alhassan was removed from the event, citing injury and was replaced by promotional newcomer [[Ricky Rainey]].<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://www.sherdog.com/news/news/Ricky-Rainey-Replaces-Abdul-Razak-Alhassan-Meets-Muslim-Salikhov-at-UFC-on-Fox-29-134357|title=Ricky Rainey replaces Abdul Razak Alhassan, meets Muslim Salikhov at UFC on Fox 29|publisher=sherdog.com|author=Tristen Critchfield|date=2018-03-31|access-date=2018-03-31}}</ref>

A welterweight bout between former [[List of World Extreme Cagefighting champions#Welterweight Championship|WEC Welterweight Champion]] and interim [[UFC Welterweight Championship|UFC Welterweight Champion]] [[Carlos Condit]] and [[Matt Brown (fighter)|Matt Brown]] was supposed to take place as the co-headliner. However, on April 2, Brown pulled out of the fight due to a torn [[anterior cruciate ligament]] and was replaced by [[Alex Oliveira]].<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.mmafighting.com/2018/4/2/17191186/injury-forces-matt-brown-out-of-ufc-on-fox-29-bout-with-carlos-condit|title=Injury forces Matt Brown out of UFC on FOX 29 bout with Carlos Condit|publisher=mmafighting.com|author=Dave Doyle|date=2018-04-02|access-date=2018-04-03}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.mmafighting.com/2018/4/3/17195458/alex-oliveira-steps-in-to-meet-carlos-condit-at-ufc-on-fox-29|title=Alex Oliveira steps in to meet Carlos Condit at UFC on FOX 29|publisher=mmafighting.com|author=Dave Doyle|date=2018-04-03|access-date=2018-04-03}}</ref>

==Bonus awards==
The following fighters were awarded $50,000 bonuses:<ref>{{Cite news|url=http://mmajunkie.com/2018/04/ufc-on-fox-29-bonuses-dustin-poirier-justin-gaethje-fight-of-night-glendale|title=UFC on FOX 29 bonuses: Poirier, Gaethje get easiest 'Fight of Night' in history of ever|publisher=mmajunkie.com|author=Staff|date=2018-04-15|access-date=2018-04-15}}</ref>
*'''Fight of the Night: Dustin Poirier vs. Justin Gaethje'''
*'''Performance of the Night: Alex Oliveira''' and '''Adam Wieczorek'''

==Reported payout==
The following is the reported payout to the fighters as reported to the Arizona Boxing and MMA Commission. It does not include sponsor money and also does not include the UFC's traditional "fight night" bonuses. The total disclosed payout for the event was $1,481,000.<ref name="payouts">{{cite web|url=http://mmajunkie.com/2018/04/ufc-on-fox-29-salaries-glendale-fight-purses-dustin-poirier|title=UFC on FOX 29 salaries: Dustin Poirier leads payouts with $170,000 in classic slugfest|publisher=mmajunkie.com|author=Staff|date=2018-04-16|access-date=2018-04-16}}</ref>

* '''Dustin Poirier:''' $170,000 (includes $85,000 win bonus) def. Justin Gaethje: $110,000
* '''Alex Oliveira:''' $100,000 (includes $50,000 win bonus) def. Carlos Condit: $115,000 
* '''Israel Adesanya:''' $106,000 (includes $53,000 win bonus) def. Marvin Vettori: $20,000
* '''Michelle Waterson:''' $80,000 (includes $40,000 win bonus) def. Cortney Casey: $33,000
* '''Antônio Carlos Júnior:''' $80,000 (includes $40,000 win bonus) def. Tim Boetsch: $72,000
* '''Muslim Salikhov:''' $20,000 (includes $10,000 win bonus) def. Rickey Rainey: $12,000
* '''John Moraga:''' $74,000 (includes $37,000 win bonus) def. Wilson Reis: $31,000
* '''Brad Tavares:''' $80,000 (includes $40,000 win bonus) def. Krzysztof Jotko : $36,000
* '''Gilbert Burns:''' $56,000 (includes $28,000 win bonus) def. Dan Moret: $12,000
* '''Lauren Mueller:''' $20,000 (includes $10,000 win bonus) def. Shana Dobson: $12,000
* '''Yushin Okami:''' $70,000 (includes $35,000 win bonus) def. Dhiego Lima: $15,000
* '''Adam Wieczorek:''' $24,000 (includes $12,000 win bonus) def. Arjan Bhullar: $12,000
* '''Alejandro Pérez:''' $50,000 (includes $25,000 win bonus) def. Matthew Lopez: $33,000
* '''Luke Sanders:''' $24,000 (includes $12,000 win bonus) def. Patrick Williams: $12,000
